ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME ON A MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
OPPOSITION TO DEFT TROUDI'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINTY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT SABER TROUDI'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL FILE HIS PROPOSED ANSWER BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS DAY OF MAY 14, 2009 AND SHALL REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF FOR REASONABLE COST OF PROCURING THE DEFAULT FOR WHICH PLAINTIFF MAY MOVE BY SEPARATE MOTION IF THE PARTIES DO NOT AGREE ON THE AMOUNT. PARTIES ARE TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO THE $300.00 COST THAT WAS STATED BY MR. BORNSTEIN AS THE COST INCURRED IN PROCURING THE DEFAULT. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- ATTY. JONATHAN BORNSTEIN OF THE LAW OFFICES OF BORNSTEIN & BORNSTEIN, TEL. NO. 409-7611 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
SABER TROUDI, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SABER TROUDI'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL FILE HIS PROPOSED ANSWER BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS DAY OF MAY 14, 2009 AND SHALL REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF FOR REASONABLE COST OF PROCURING THE DEFAULT FOR WHICH PLAINTIFF MAY MOVE BY SEPARATE MOTION IF THE PARTIES DO NOT AGREE ON THE AMOUNT. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO THE $300.00 COST THAT WAS STATED BY ATTY. BORNSTEIN AS THE COST INCURRED IN PROCURING THE DEFAULT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J.
